key_observation: Switching to coupled Lorenz produces the first clearly positive mean ΔA after structural perturbations (+0.0249 vs random +0.0025). This addresses the main failure mode diagnosed in v0.2/v0.3. However overall AUC remains ~0.48 and J0.7 does not yet show clear superiority on the labels. Larger separation in post-JE recovery for Y=1 vs Y=0 is visible.
